case_title: FIZELL MORGAN VS HMW & JK ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $300.00 FILED BY HMW & JK ENTERPRISES INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FIZELL MORGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIZELL MORGAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HMW & JK ENTERPRISES INC. $360.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $375.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HMW & JK ENTERPRISES INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FIZELL MORGAN NOT APPEALED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
